delay_resolution: Hello {{name}}, we apologise for the delay. New ETA: {{eta}}. A goodwill credit of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been approved.
quality_resolution: Hello {{name}}, we are sorry about the quality issue. A replacement is on its way and a credit of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been applied to your account.
billing_resolution: Hello {{name}}, we have identified and corrected the billing discrepancy. A credit of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been issued to your account.
service_resolution: Hello {{name}}, we regret the service issue you experienced. A goodwill credit of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been applied.
